{"id":"project-LICHEN-inbf","title":"compat_settings dereference without null check in multiple functions","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshcore/adapter.c

Several functions call compat_settings() or compat_settings_const() and check for NULL before use, but the pattern is inconsistent.

Good pattern (with check):
- Line 185: if (settings != NULL && settings->advert_name_valid)
- Line 231: if (settings != NULL && settings->device_pin_valid)
- Line 399-400: if (settings != NULL && settings->channel0_valid)

Some store_* functions check for NULL and return error:
- Line 661-663: if (settings == NULL) return error

This is defensive and correct. However, a code reviewer seeing both patterns might assume NULL is impossible and remove checks in the future.

Consider: standardize on one approach - either always check and handle NULL, or use _Nonnull annotation on compat_settings and never check.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:47:52.415201Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:47:52.415228Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-inbf","title":"compat_settings dereference without null check in multiple functions","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshcore/adapter.c

Several functions call compat_settings() or compat_settings_const() and check for NULL before use, but the pattern is inconsistent.

Good pattern (with check):
- Line 185: if (settings != NULL && settings->advert_name_valid)
- Line 231: if (settings != NULL && settings->device_pin_valid)
- Line 399-400: if (settings != NULL && settings->channel0_valid)

Some store_* functions check for NULL and return error:
- Line 661-663: if (settings == NULL) return error

This is defensive and correct. However, a code reviewer seeing both patterns might assume NULL is impossible and remove checks in the future.

Consider: standardize on one approach - either always check and handle NULL, or use _Nonnull annotation on compat_settings and never check.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:47:52.415201Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:09:11.497523074Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T23:09:11.497523074Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T23:14:11.497523074Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T23:09:11.497523074Z"}
